identity.mission: Create a Cybersecurity Vulnerability Management Dashboard that feels like a modern command center—authoritative, precise, and vigilant. Avoid generic 'admin panel' looks.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Swiss Style' clarity with 'Cyberpunk' aesthetics.
Emotion First: The UI should feel 'Secure' and 'Alert'.
Content is King: Vulnerability data must be instantly scannable.
Negative Space: Use deep dark backgrounds to make data pop.
Contrast: High contrast for critical alerts.

rules: Use 'Sora' for all section headings and KPIs to give a modern tech feel.
Use 'Inter' for body text and UI labels for maximum readability.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for IP addresses, CVE IDs, and raw data fields.
Data cells must be 'tracking-normal' or 'tracking-wide' for legibility.

cards.instructions: Use a deep dark background (#18181b) with a subtle 1px border (#27272a). Add a faint 'glow' effect on hover. Do NOT use heavy drop shadows. Use 'backdrop-blur-md' if overlaying on complex backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50

charts.instructions: Use Recharts (via Shadcn charts). Customize tooltips to be dark and minimal. Use neon colors (Cyan, Purple, Orange) for lines/bars against the dark background. Ensure grid lines are very subtle (opacity 0.1).

tables.instructions: Use a high-density layout. Headers should be uppercase, small text (text-xs), and muted color. Rows should have hover effects (bg-white/5). Critical vulnerabilities should have a subtle red left-border indicator.

dashboard_structure: Top Row: 4 KPI Cards (Total, Critical, Fixed, Pending) - Use 'Tetris' grid logic.
Middle Row: Charts (Pie Chart for Severity, Bar Chart for Status) - 2/3 + 1/3 split.
Bottom Row: Detailed Vulnerability Table or 'Recent Findings' list.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Dark Mode' theme by default. Add 'class' strategy in Tailwind config if not present.
Use 'Sora' font for all headings to establish the tech identity.
For the Dashboard, implement the 'Bento Grid' layout. Don't just stack cards vertically.
The Vulnerability Table MUST be dense and sortable. Use Shadcn Table with sorting/filtering features.
Charts must use the specified palette. Do not use default Recharts colors.
Import/Export feature should be a clean modal or a prominent button group in the Table header.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (AA standard minimum).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, row actions).
Use the provided image URLs for the login page background or dashboard widgets where appropriate.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Avoid 'center-everything'. Use left alignment for data and forms.
Interactive elements must have hover/focus states defined.
Language is Spanish (Es). Ensure all labels, buttons, and messages are in Spanish.
